scenes.title: Open-source AI workflow automation should be easy to trust.
scenes.body: Flyto2 keeps the runtime, docs, issues, and examples visible so contributors can inspect the loop.
scenes.narration: Open-source AI workflow automation should be easy to trust. Flyto2 keeps the runtime, docs, issues, and examples visible so contributors can inspect the loop.
scenes.visualCue: Show the canonical post and Flyto2 community hub.

scenes.title: One source, many useful surfaces.
scenes.body: A blog post links to docs, GitHub issues, package pages, and the community hub instead of scattering the story.
scenes.narration: One source can support many useful surfaces. The blog post links to docs, GitHub issues, package pages, and the community hub instead of scattering the story.
scenes.visualCue: Map blog, docs, GitHub, PyPI, and YouTube around one URL.

scenes.title: Good-first work matters.
scenes.body: Small issues, reproducible recipes, and showcase prompts help new contributors do real work without guessing.
scenes.narration: Good-first work matters. Small issues, reproducible recipes, and showcase prompts help new contributors do real work without guessing.
scenes.visualCue: Show issue labels, recipe files, and expected output.

scenes.title: Social posts should be reviewed, not sprayed.
scenes.body: Flyto2 drafts LinkedIn, Facebook, GitHub, YouTube, and package-page copy from one plan, then keeps live publishing behind maintainer approval.
scenes.narration: Social posts should be reviewed, not sprayed. Flyto2 drafts channel copy from one plan, then keeps live publishing behind maintainer approval.
scenes.visualCue: Show dry-run payloads and private-first review status.

scenes.title: Every claim points back to evidence.
scenes.body: The canonical article, docs, and open-source repositories stay linked so viewers can verify details before trying the tool.
scenes.narration: Every claim points back to evidence. The canonical article, docs, and open-source repositories stay linked so viewers can verify details before trying the tool.
scenes.visualCue: Show canonical URL, docs link, and GitHub repository link.

scenes.title: Join the Flyto2 community.
scenes.body: Start from flyto2.com/community, pick one issue, share one recipe, or show one automation that worked.
scenes.narration: Join the Flyto2 community. Start from flyto2.com/community, pick one issue, share one recipe, or show one automation that worked.
scenes.visualCue: Close with the Flyto2 community URL and one clear contribution path.
